title: Watch Kendrick Lamar Win Best Rap Album For 'GNX' | 2026 Grammys Acceptance Speech
text: At the 2026 Grammy Awards ceremony on February 1, 2026, Kendrick Lamar won Best Rap Album for his album GNX. The nominees included Clipse (Let God Sort Em Out), GloRilla (GLORIOUS), JID (God Does Like Ugly), and Tyler, The Creator (CHROMAKOPIA). This win was part of a historic night for Kendrick. He won five Grammys during the ceremony including Best Melodic Rap Performance (Luther with SZA), Best Rap Song (TV Off featuring Lefty Gunplay), Best Rap Performance (Chains & Whips with Clipse), Best Rap Album (GNX) and Record of the Year (Luther with SZA). With this victory, he officially surpassed Jay-Z for the most Grammy wins by a rapper, reaching 27 total.
